ai_summary: This document reports the resignation of Mr. Ajit Kolhe, Head of Information Technology and Senior Management at Carborundum Universal Limited, effective June 26, 2026, to pursue external career prospects. While the departure of a senior IT leader may necessitate a robust succession plan to ensure continuity and strategic direction for technology initiatives, the three-month notice period between his resignation letter and effective date is standard and mitigates immediate operational disruption; no significant red flags are present.
